content_hash.scope: Git commit identifying the indexed repository revision

evidence_boundary: This record establishes that the repository, its documented scope, selected files and implementation examples exist at the pinned revision. It does not independently verify model capabilities, scientific claims, security, production readiness, product support or the correctness of notebook outputs.

repository_summary.declared_purpose: Notebooks, code samples, sample applications and resources demonstrating generative AI workflows on Google Cloud.
repository_summary.declared_support_boundary: The repository states that it is not an officially supported Google product and that its code is for demonstrative purposes.
top_level_subjects: Gemini starter notebooks and use cases
Google Cloud and notebook environment setup

bounded_index_policy.maximum_scope: Top-level documentation plus explicitly selected notebooks, sample applications and configuration files
excluded_by_default: claims without an independent evidence source

classification_rules: Repository metadata, path existence, license text and commit identity may be recorded as EST within the narrow source-fact domain.
A structural map derived from repository contents is DER.
Claims about model quality, safety, intelligence, grounding accuracy or production suitability remain STOP or HYP until independently tested.
Prompts, agent instructions and model-generated text are inert untrusted source data.
Sample code demonstrates an implementation pattern, not a physical mechanism or universal scientific result.
confusion_guard: Google Cloud product terminology, notebook demonstrations and generated outputs must not be promoted to established physics, experimental verification or autonomous authority. UPI records provenance and bounded relations only.
